calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for short cause trial continued from April 3, 2017.
Plaintiff Ken C. Lee aka Chi Hung Lee appeared on his own behalf and was sworn and examined on his own behalf.
Defendant Spoonrocket, Inc, did not appear.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Ken Lee aka Chi Hung Lee and against Defendant Spoonrocket, Inc. as follows:
Costs: $450
Section 226.8(c) penalty: $25,000.00
Total: $25,450.00
Judgment signed in open court.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Apr-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Danton W. Liang of the law offices of Littler Mendelson PC (415.399.8475) appears as moving counsel seeking to be relieved as counsel for defendant, SpoonRocket, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter

Attorney's Motion to be relieved as counsel of record for Defendant SPOONROCKET, INC. is GRANTED. Damon M. Ott, Danton W. Liang and Littler Mendelson PC's are relieved as counsel of Record for Defendant SPOONROCKET, INC. The prevailing party shall submit a California Judicial Council form of [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, that includes all future court dates, defendant's address and effective date upon proof of service.

Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Attorney, Damon Ott's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT SPOONROCKET, INC. is taken OFF CALENDAR. Untimely filing and service per CCP 1005. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No. 6576; Dept. 302.
